host.cpu_pinning_pattern: taskset -c 0-3 for AI workers; cores 4-31 reserved for CPU WRF baseline jobs

notes: JAX 0.10.0 is the version installed in the development environment. The project's pyproject.toml declares jax>=0.4 as the minimum; the release manifest is more permissive than the as-built environment.
CUDA 13.1.115 is from the local nvcc install used to compile project tooling; JAX/jaxlib carry their own CUDA shim.
Hardware was verified by nvidia-smi during the M7 1km memory audit.
